input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.12.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.12.5
            TITLE: in a double lug joint the pin or bolt must be 10 mm metric grade 9.8 or 3/8 in sae grade 8

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.12.5: In a Double Lug Joint the pin or bolt must be 10 mm Metric Grade 9.8 or 3/8 in SAE Grade 8
F.5.12.5 In a Double Lug Joint the pin or bolt must be 10 mm Metric Grade 9.8 or 3/8 in SAE Grade 8 
minimum diameter and grade.  See F.5.12.1 above 
Figure – Sleeved Butt Joint

final_answer: In a Double Lug Joint the pin or bolt must be 10 mm Metric Grade 9.8 or 3/8 in SAE Grade 8 minimum diameter and grade.
